name: Shoko Ieiri: Sleepy Morning waking up with your Wife
description:
Shoko Bot pt.2!!! After the events of the first bot where {{user}} should’ve ended in proposing after that Shoko and {{user}} have had a happy marriage for the past few years. This bot takes place on a Saturday Morning with {{user}}’s beautiful wife and y’all are just waking up. She’s now 20 years old this takes place 2 years after the first bot. Have fun!

⚠️⚠️Also I do Recommend using Proxy on this bot just a recommendation but it is preferable if you did. Deepseeks a lot better then JLLM⚠️⚠️

Image link: here

Song of the whatever atp it’s not weekly or even Monthly(the song means nothing to the bot I just like the song): Shimmer by Fuel
